artifacts.summary: Z-indexed chain with ordering, obligation enumeration, enriched chain construction with witness placement
Phases 1-2 completion summary with design decisions and verification results

completion_data.completion_summary: Phase 3 BLOCKED: F-formula non-persistence through GContent seeds is a fundamental mathematical obstacle that prevents proving forward_F for any linear chain construction (same blocker as DovetailingChain's 12+ failed attempts). The enriched chain from Phase 2 works for witness placement when F(phi) is alive at the decoding step, but cannot guarantee F-persistence across steps. Resolution requires the canonical quotient / embedding approach (build forward_F at CanonicalMCS level where it is trivial, then embed into Int), NOT a linear chain construction.

partial_progress.details: Phase 3 (Forward F) BLOCKED by fundamental mathematical obstacle: F-formula non-persistence through GContent seeds in linear chain constructions. This is identical to the well-documented DovetailingChain blocker (12+ prior failed attempts). The enriched chain from Phase 2 has the same structural limitation. Resolution requires abandoning the linear chain approach for forward_F and using the canonical quotient / embedding approach instead.

review_reason: Phase 3 forward_F proof is impossible for the current enriched chain construction. F-formulas (F(phi) = neg(G(neg(phi)))) do not persist through GContent seeds because Lindenbaum extensions can introduce G(neg(phi)), killing F(phi). This is the same fundamental blocker that defeated 12+ prior attempts in DovetailingChain.lean. The linearity axiom does NOT fix persistence (confirmed in Boneyard/CanonicalEmbedding.lean). The plan's assumption that 'the enriched chain construction in Phase 2 already places witnesses' is only partially correct - witnesses are placed when F(phi) is alive at the decoding step, but there is no guarantee F(phi) survives from position t to position encodeFormula(phi). Resolution path: use canonical quotient / embedding approach (CanonicalMCS-level forward_F is trivially sorry-free via canonicalMCS_forward_F, then embed the linearly-ordered reachable fragment into Int). This requires revising the plan (Phases 3-7) to use the embedding approach rather than the linear chain construction.

errors.message: forward_F for linear chain is unprovable due to F-formula non-persistence through GContent seeds. This is a well-documented fundamental limitation (DovetailingChain.lean, Boneyard/CanonicalEmbedding.lean).
errors.recommendation: Revise plan to use canonical quotient / embedding approach: (1) Resurrect CanonicalEmbedding.lean infrastructure from Boneyard, (2) Build TemporalCoherentFamily over CanonicalMCS (already done in CanonicalFMCS.lean), (3) Embed linearly-ordered reachable fragment into Int via Mathlib's orderIsoIntOfLinearSuccPredArch or Order.embedding_from_countable_to_dense, (4) Pull back the FMCS to get FMCS Int with forward_F.
